summary: Lead accepts the M3 client appointment UI after writer REVIEW, qa_reviewer REQUEST_CHANGES for a 1440x1000 horizontal overflow, writer R2 fix, and qa_reviewer R2 ACCEPT. The implementation adds client read-model slices for M3 character, polity/vassal, office, obligation, succession/vacancy, eligibility, bulk preview, appointment/enfeoffment result, and reason summaries; renders React DOM appointment and bulk workflows; builds sim.appoint-office and sim.appoint-offices-bulk command DTOs through client-core; keeps UI state non-authoritative; and adds Playwright coverage for command submission and desktop no-horizontal-overflow.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff writer REVIEW, writer R2 REVIEW, and QA R2 ACCEPT
tests_run.result: All available M3 client appointment UI handoffs validate.
All changed/untracked paths are within task allowed_paths; no forbidden path hits.
No client-side WorldState storage, Redux store, authoritative sim-core/save-format import, Electron IPC, Node fs, Math.random, or Date.now authority usage found in touched surfaces.
Vite production web build passed; existing chunk-size warning remains.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism hashes matched; root Vitest 24 files/161 tests passed; web tests passed.
Chromium Playwright 4 tests passed, including M3 command submission and 1440x1000 no-horizontal-overflow.
format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed.

decisions: ACCEPT: Playwright coverage satisfies the task's Storybook-or-Playwright requirement because it covers appointment, bulk action, per-item rejection reasons, visible character/obligation reasons, command submission, and the QA-requested viewport fit check.
ACCEPT: The UI generates protocol command DTOs and hands them to a shell callback instead of mutating authoritative state locally.
ACCEPT: The live-query integration gap is recorded as a future risk rather than solved by copying sim-core formulas into UI.
risks: The M3 appointment workspace uses protocol DTO projection fixtures until a future approved worker query adapter supplies a live page-level appointment read model.
The existing Vite chunk-size warning remains unrelated to this task.
requested_action: Commit, push, create PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark M3-CLIENT-APPOINTMENT-UI-001 CLOSED and continue to the next READY M3 task.
